memberComparison.label: More than double the next-largest U.S. local association
memberComparison.phrase: more than double the next-largest local association in the U.S. (43,000 members), larger than 47 state associations, and about 33 percent larger than the next largest in the world
memberComparison.source: MIAMI REALTORS / RWorld merger announcement, April 20, 2026 (docs/sources/miami-rworld-merger-announcement-2026-04-20.pdf)
